Package com.saperion.connector.formats.serializable

Class SerializableTargetFormat

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.connector.formats.serializable.SerializableTargetFormat
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class SerializableTargetFormat extends Object implements Serializable
Serializable representation of a TargetFormat following bean-conventions.
